ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the index (e.g., CCPI Rank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the index measures */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the index was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the index value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country being assessed */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate index being measured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_performance_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES climate_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_performance_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the economic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the emissions record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the emissions data */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* Total CO2 emissions from the country (in million tons) */,
  "share_of_global_emissions" REAL /* Share of global CO2 emissions */,
  "emission_source" TEXT /* Source of emissions (e.g., industrial, transportation) */,
  "emission_intensity" REAL /* Emission intensity (emissions per unit of GDP) */,
  "reduction_target" REAL /* Target reduction in emissions for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the energy data */,
  "primary_energy_supply" REAL /* Total primary energy supply (in million tons of oil equivalent) */,
  "share_of_global_supply" REAL /* Share of global primary energy supply */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in the primary energy supply */,
  "energy_efficiency" REAL /* Energy efficiency (energy consumption per unit of GDP) */,
  "energy_policy_index" REAL /* Index measuring the effectiveness of energy policies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the summary record */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score based on various performance metrics */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on overall score */,
  "climate_action_score" REAL /* Score specifically for climate action */,
  "economic_resilience_score" REAL /* Score for economic resilience */,
  "sustainability_score" REAL /* Score for overall sustainability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_summary_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the international agreement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agreement */,
  "year_signed" INTEGER /* Year the agreement was signed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement (e.g., ratified, signed but not ratified) */,
  "protocol_type" TEXT /* Type of agreement (e.g., treaty, protocol) */,
  "key_provisions" TEXT /* Brief description of key provisions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_agreements" (
  "country_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the country-agreement relation */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the international agreement */,
  "ratification_date" TEXT /* Date when the country ratified the agreement */,
  "implementation_status" TEXT /* Status of implementation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_agreements_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_agreements_agreement_id FOREIGN KEY ("agreement_id") REFERENCES international_agreements ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., data analyst, policymaker) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
